name: Improper Handling of URL Encoding (Hex Encoding)
description: The product does not properly handle URL-encoded (percent-encoded) characters in input, allowing attackers to bypass security filters by encoding dangerous characters as %XX hex sequences that are decoded after the filter runs.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides URL-encoded data (%XX hex sequences) that bypasses CONTROL[input_filter] checking the encoded form, while a downstream TRANSFORM[url_decode] reveals the dangerous characters, without a TRANSFORM[decode_before_filter] normalizing the encoding before the security check
